items.title: Why Jito’s 14% rally faces a reality check as JTO netflow turns negative
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jito's recent rally may be unsustainable as negative netflow signals potential liquidity issues, impacting investor confidence in the platform.

items.title: UK FCA proposes allowing authorized funds to allocate up to 10% to crypto ETNs
items.whyYouShouldCare: The UK FCA's proposal to allow authorized funds to invest in crypto ETNs could enhance institutional interest in crypto assets, potentially increasing demand for Solana-based projects.

items.title: Bybit challenges Wall Street with a massive push into tokenized U.S. stock IPOs
items.whyYouShouldCare: Bybit's entry into tokenized U.S. stock IPOs could drive new user engagement and liquidity in the crypto market, indirectly benefiting the Solana ecosystem.
